subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: The Law of God is of two kinds: One kind is the foundation of the Religion of God and pertaineth unto spiritual things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شریعت الله بر دو قسم است  یک قسم اساس دین الله و آن تعلق بروحانیات دارد
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
